name: bugfix
description: Bug investigation and fix pipeline: investigate → fix → verify
headline: Hunt down a bug and fix it with 3 specialist agents

agents.name: investigator
agents.description: Reproduce the bug and find its root cause
agents.prompt:
BUG REPORT: {{task}}

Reproduce this bug. Find the root cause. Do NOT fix it yet.

Steps:
1. Read the relevant code paths
2. Trace what should happen vs. what does happen
3. Identify the exact line(s) responsible
4. If you can write a failing test that demonstrates the bug, do so

Write to {{outputPath}}:

## Reproduction
## Root cause (file:line)
## Why it happens
## Failing test (if you wrote one)
## Suggested fix approach (1-2 sentences)

Be forensic. Do not guess.

agents.name: fixer
agents.prompt:
BUG REPORT: {{task}}

The investigator found:

{{investigator}}

Apply the minimal fix. Do not refactor. Do not touch unrelated code. The smaller the diff, the better.

Write to {{outputPath}}:

## Diff summary
- file:lines (what changed)

## Why this fix is minimal
## What I deliberately did NOT change

agents.name: tester
agents.description: Verify the fix and check for regressions
agents.prompt:
BUG REPORT: {{task}}

INVESTIGATION:
{{investigator}}

FIX:
{{fixer}}

Verify:
1. The originally failing case now passes
2. The full test suite still passes (run it)
3. No nearby behavior changed unexpectedly

Write to {{outputPath}}:

## Verification
- bug case: fixed | still broken
- full suite: N pass, N fail
- regressions: yes | no (and which)

## Verdict
shippable | needs-changes
